metadata.description: Knowledge management and workflow automation plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: session-learner
plugins.description: Turn a working session into atomic Zettelkasten knowledge via a wrap-up → pick-up → recommend reflection funnel

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Eval-driven improvement loop (keep/discard with a live HTML dashboard) plus a dev-lifecycle harness builder that scores project health and scaffolds feedback loops, evals, and sensors. Inspired by karpathy/autoresearch.

plugins.name: remotion-maker
plugins.description: Generate Remotion videos with consistent style, media sourcing, and multi-tier verification

plugins.name: hh
plugins.description: LifeOS-as-SSOT handover document management via folder symlinks. Subsumes /op:wrap-up-today.

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Principle-aware PR review. Layers a repo-specific review-mindset agent on top of pr-review-toolkit's 4+6 perspectives, with configurable principle-directory roots.

plugins.name: uiux-optimizer
plugins.description: UI/UX design advisor — orchestrates reference-driven patterns (refero.design + awesome-design-md catalogue), anti-slop taste discipline, and motion choreography across audit/build/explore modes and a gated ship pipeline (direction → static → motion). Degrades gracefully when the optional taste-skill / motion-design-skill are not installed.
